chapter_title.en: The Limits of Ablution, Its Order and Reward

text: 95 - وَقَالَ اَلْعَالِمُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «ثَلاَثَةٌ لاَ أَتَّقِي فِيهَا أَحَداً شُرْبُ اَلْمُسْكِرِ وَ اَلْمَسْحُ عَلَى اَلْخُفَّيْنِ وَ مُتْعَةُ اَلْحَجِّ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.95 - The scholar, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"There are three things in which I do not fear anyone (taqiyya): drinking intoxicants, wiping over the leather socks (khuffs), and the Hajj Tamattu'"
